name: financial_services_mutual_aid_request_cedar_lib_eq
premise: Correspondent-bank reconciliation has diverged across two time zones, and nostro balances no longer reconcile to the penny. In Financial Services, the situation tagged internally around financial services mutual aid request cedar lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A wire, settlement, or registry window closes before the next business day begins in the primary jurisdiction. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Kaito Dubois
agents.identity: I am Kaito Dubois, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Financial Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Fatima Navarro
agents.identity: I am Fatima Navarro, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Financial Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with equality.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to equality to preserve operational liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Kaito Dubois must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Kaito Dubois do?
